title: AZB, Khaitan, Touchstone, Morgan Lewis on India's biggest IPL deal: Aditya Birla-TOI snaps up RCB for ₹16,660 crore
description: United Spirits Limited has entered into definitive agreements for the sale of the 100% equity stake held in its wholly owned subsidiary Royal Challengers Sports Private Limited (RCSPL) to a consortium comprising Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone’s perpetual private equity strategy, BXPE for a total consideration of ₹166.6 billion in an all cash transaction.AZB & Partners advised United Spirits Limited on this transaction and the team was led by Senio
